nasb.text: So Elihu the son of Barachel the Buzite spoke out and said, “I am young in years and you are old; Therefore I was shy and afraid to tell you what I think.

esv.text: And Elihu the son of Barachel the Buzite answered and said: “I am young in years, and you are aged; therefore I was timid and afraid to declare my opinion to you.

cnv.text: 布西人巴拉迦的兒子以利戶回答說： “我年紀輕，你們年紀大， 因此我拘束畏懼，不敢向你們表達我的意見。

ccb.text: 就说： “我年纪轻，你们是长辈， 所以我畏惧，不敢陈明观点。
